name: Braze, Inc.
summary: Braze, Inc. is a leading customer engagement platform that empowers brands to build direct, meaningful relationships with customers. Founded in 2011, Braze offers cross-channel marketing automation, data activation, segmentation, orchestration, and personalization capabilities. As of January 2026, the platform served 2,609 customers and enabled interactions with 8.0 billion monthly active users via apps, websites, and digital interfaces, leveraging AI and machine learning through products like BrazeAI Decisioning Studio and BrazeAI Agent Console.

products.name: Braze Customer Engagement Platform
products.description: End-to-end cross-channel customer engagement platform combining data activation, segmentation, orchestration, and personalization.

products.name: BrazeAI Decisioning Studio
products.description: AI-powered decisioning tool integrated into the Braze platform for intelligent customer engagement.

products.name: BrazeAI Agent Console
products.description: AI agent interface within the Braze platform for managing customer engagement automation.

products.name: BrazeAI Operator
products.description: AI operator product within the Braze platform ecosystem.

products.name: Braze Data Platform
products.description: Proprietary stream processing architecture that receives, contextualizes, and responds to first-party customer data in real time.

products.name: Canvas
products.description: Visual development environment within Braze for building and orchestrating customer engagement campaigns.

products.name: Braze Currents
products.description: Data export product enabling customers to stream engagement data to external platforms.

products.name: Braze Catalogs
products.description: Product catalog feature within the Braze platform for personalized messaging.

products.name: Braze Cloud Data Ingestion
products.description: Feature enabling ingestion of customer data from cloud data sources into the Braze platform.

products.name: Braze Audience Sync
products.description: Feature for synchronizing customer audiences across marketing channels and platforms.

products.name: Braze Content Cards
products.description: In-app and in-product content card messaging channel within the Braze platform.

products.name: Braze Segments
products.description: Audience segmentation capability within the Braze platform.
